verdicts.corrected_value: Higgsfield is an AI image & video generation platform exposing a Minimal Connector Protocol (MCP) server and CLI for programmatic agent integrations.
verdicts.reasoning: The homepage confirms the description of Higgsfield as an AI image and video generation platform with a focus on the MCP and CLI.
The CLI page explicitly states that authentication is done via a Higgsfield account and session tokens, confirming the recorded value.
The pricing page is accessible but does not provide sufficient information to confirm how developers can access credentials, leaving the claim unsupported.
While the MCP documentation is accessible, it does not provide enough detail to confirm the breadth of the API surface, thus the claim remains unsupported.
Due to the lack of clarity on credential access and API surface, the buildability remains unsupported as it cannot be confirmed whether account creation and credits are self-serve.
